author: gb9t
content: Iter 75 result: drivers/md/raid5.md (md raid5/raid6 - raid5.c ~9173 + raid5-cache.c ~3187 + raid5-ppl.c ~1521; per-stripe StripeHead cache + state machine (Reading/Computing/Writing) + RMW vs RCW heuristic + RAID-6 dual parity P+Q via Galois-Field RS + async-tx DMA-engine integration + journal device write-hole-defense + PPL alternative + reshape) + virt/kvm/x86-vmx-vpid.md (VPID TLB-tagging - in vmx.c ~200-300 lines; per-host vmx_vpid_bitmap with VMX_NR_VPIDS=16384 + per-vCPU unique 16-bit VPID + INVVPID instruction with 4 types + per-CR3-change selective flush + cross-CPU migrate flush + nested-VMX distinct L2-VPID). 100 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/raid0.md (linear striping) + virt/kvm/x86-svm-asid.md (AMD ASID equivalent of VPID).
